sourcesContent:
import { Alert, Box, Button, Grid, Paper, Stack, Typography } from "@mui/material";
import { Link as RouterLink } from "react-router-dom";

function Home({ auth }) {
  return (
    <Stack spacing={3}>
      <Paper sx={{ p: { xs: 3, md: 5 }, borderRadius: 3 }}>
        <Typography variant="h3" fontWeight={700} gutterBottom>
          Full-Stack Authentication Demo
        </Typography>
        <Typography variant="body1" color="text.secondary" sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
          This project includes login state management, JWT authentication,
          protected routes, and admin-only route protection.
        </Typography>

        <Stack direction={{ xs: "column", sm: "row" }} spacing={2}>
          <Button variant="contained" component={RouterLink} to="/login">
            Login
          </Button>
          <Button variant="outlined" component={RouterLink} to="/register">
            Register
          </Button>
          <Button variant="outlined" component={RouterLink} to="/dashboard">
            Go to Dashboard
          </Button>
          {auth?.user?.role === "admin" && (
            <Button variant="outlined" component={RouterLink} to="/admin">
              Open Admin
            </Button>
          )}
        </Stack>
      </Paper>

      <Grid container spacing={3}>
        <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
          <Paper sx={{ p: 3, height: "100%" }}>
            <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
              Experiment 1
            </Typography>
            <Typography color="text.secondary">
              React login form with controlled inputs, validation, loading
              state, and alerts.
            </Typography>
          </Paper>
        </Grid>
        <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
          <Paper sx={{ p: 3, height: "100%" }}>
            <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
              Experiment 2
            </Typography>
            <Typography color="text.secondary">
              JWT-based authentication with protected frontend and backend
              routes.
            </Typography>
          </Paper>
        </Grid>
        <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
          <Paper sx={{ p: 3, height: "100%" }}>
            <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
              Experiment 3
            </Typography>
            <Typography color="text.secondary">
              Role-based access control with admin-only APIs and pages.
            </Typography>
          </Paper>
        </Grid>
      </Grid>

      {!auth?.token && (
        <Alert severity="warning">
          Login is required to access the dashboard and admin pages.
        </Alert>
      )}
    </Stack>
  );
}

export default Home;
